---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature for bulwark
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What problem does this feature solve? What threat does it address? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they don't work as well.

## Scope check

Please confirm:

- [ ] This fits bulwark's scope (network security monitoring / protection for open wireless)
- [ ] This doesn't require adding large dependencies
- [ ] This can be implemented without adding `unsafe` blocks (or if it does, the trade-off is justified)
- [ ] This is testable without requiring root or special hardware

## Additional context

Links to references, papers, similar tools, or prior art.
